---
title: "Infographics | Ayel L. R. Batac"
title-block: false
canonical-url: https://ayelbatac.github.io/infographics
description: "Explore infographics by Ayel L. R. Batac that translate research into accessible visual summaries for knowledge translation."

format:
  html:
    toc: false
    anchor-links: false
---

# INFOGRAPHICS

$~$

<style>
/* Add hover zoom effect */
.infographic-gallery img {
  transition: transform 0.3s ease;
}

.infographic-gallery img:hover {
  transform: scale(1.05); /* Slight zoom on hover */
}
</style>

<div class="infographic-gallery" style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 2rem;">

  <!-- 1 image -->
  <a href="facts_in_fear_out.png" target="_blank">
    <img src="facts_in_fear_out.png" alt="Fear, Facts, and the Future Infographic" style="width: 100%; border-radius: 8px;">
  </a>
  
  <!-- 2 image -->
  <a href="hesitation_vaccinale.png" target="_blank">
    <img src="hesitation_vaccinale.png" alt="Infographie : La peur, les faits et l’avenir" style="width: 100%; border-radius: 8px;">
  </a>

  <!-- 3 image -->
  <a href="hiv_prevention_for_before_and_after_exposure.png" target="_blank">
    <img src="hiv_prevention_for_before_and_after_exposure.png" alt="PrEP and PEP Infographic" style="width: 100%; border-radius: 8px;">
  </a>
  
  <!-- 4 image -->
  <a href="prevention_du_VIH.png" target="_blank">
    <img src="prevention_du_VIH.png" alt="Infographie : PPrE et PPE" style="width: 100%; border-radius: 8px;">
  </a>

  <!-- 5 image -->
  <a href="u_equals_u.png" target="_blank">
    <img src="u_equals_u.png" alt="U=U Infographic" style="width: 100%; border-radius: 8px;">
  </a>

  <!-- 6 image -->
  <a href="i_egale_i.png" target="_blank">
    <img src="i_egale_i.png" alt="Infographie : I=I" style="width: 100%; border-radius: 8px;">
  </a>
  
  <!-- 7 image -->
  <a href="eai_approved_china.png" target="_blank">
    <img src="eai_approved_china.png" alt="EAI China Infographic" style="width: 100%; border-radius: 8px;">
  </a>

  <!-- 8 image -->
  <a href="eczema_maternal_infant_bonding.png" target="_blank">
    <img src="maternal_infant_bonding.png" alt="Maternal Infant Bonding Infographic" style="width: 100%; border-radius: 8px;">
  </a>

  <!-- 9 image -->
  <a href="accord_qual.jpg" target="_blank">
    <img src="accord_qual.jpg" alt="ACCORD Qualitative Study Infographic" style="width: 100%; border-radius: 8px;">
  </a>

  <!-- 10 image -->
  <a href="allergic_reactions_are_rare.png" target="_blank">
    <img src="allergic_reactions_are_rare.png" alt="ACCORD Review Infographic" style="width: 100%; border-radius: 8px;">
  </a>

  <!-- 11 image -->
  <a href="reactions_allergiques_covid19.png" target="_blank">
    <img src="reactions_allergiques_covid19.png" alt="Infographie : Les réactions allergiques sont rares" style="width: 100%; border-radius: 8px;">
  </a>

  <!-- 12 image -->
  <a href="child_burden.jpg" target="_blank">
    <img src="child_burden.jpg" alt="Child Burden Infographic" style="width: 100%; border-radius: 8px;">
  </a>

</div>

$~$

$~$

All visual communication materials presented on this page, including infographics, posters, and other related graphics, have been independently conceptualized, designed, and produced by Ayel L. R. Batac. These materials are original works created to support the dissemination and translation of research knowledge.

$~$
